desc: Exports every filter in the model (ParameterFilterElement) to JSON.
summary: Exports every filter in the model (ParameterFilterElement) to JSON. Includes categories and decoded rules via GetViewFilterSettings. For per-view filter export, use ExportViewFilterSettingsCommand instead.
usecase: User wants a full list of every filter defined in the project.
postcondition: JSON file written to disk with all model filters.

outputs.name: filePath
outputs.description: File path the JSON was saved to

preprompts: Exporting all model filters to JSON...
Gathering every filter in the project...
thinkingsteps: Collecting all filters in the document...
successprompts: Done — {totalFilters} model filters saved to JSON.
